repo_signals: debug a CSS grid layout alignment issue in the marketing page

retrieval_query: embedding model hnsw ivf pq qdrant milvus pgvector hybrid search bm25 vector rerank recall precision

validation_smoke.name: code.vector-search L3 validation smoke
signals: recall@k and precision@k are measured on a labeled query set before and after an index change
the query embedding model and version exactly match the model that built the index
hybrid fusion improves recall over either lexical or vector alone on the eval set

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.vector-search diagnosis smoke
signals: recall drops because the query is embedded with a different model than the indexed vectors
an ANN index returns approximate neighbors that miss true matches due to an under-tuned graph
